ChatGPT said:

First paragraph BRIDGE_E2E_CAPTURED_MARKER keeps inline const inlineValue = 42, embedded-backtick `inlineLike`, bold text, italic text, removed text, Unicode café λ 漢字 and symbols < > &.

Second paragraph remains a separate block.

JavaScript
const marker = "BRIDGE_E2E_CAPTURED_MARKER";
const inlineLike = "`not a fence`";
const fenceLike = "```still code```";
const symbols = "<>&";
function render(value) {
  return marker + ":" + value;
}

console.log(render(symbols));

Text between code blocks: BRIDGE_E2E_CAPTURED_MARKER.

Python
marker = "BRIDGE_E2E_CAPTURED_MARKER"
values = [1, 2, 3]

def total(items):
    return sum(items)

print(f"{marker}:{total(values)}")

PARSE_END_BRIDGE_E2E_CAPTURED_MARKER

Нравится ли вам эта личность?
